name: smartbooks-accounting-app
description: SmartBooks Accounting App split into frontend, backend, shared, and docs folders.

scripts.check: node --check backend/src/server.js && node --check frontend/src/services/navigation-model.js && node --check frontend/src/services/icon-service.js && node --check frontend/src/services/storage-service.js && node --check frontend/src/main.js && node --check frontend/src/features/sales-tax-inventory-ui.js && node --check frontend/src/features/workflows-and-reporting.js && node --check frontend/src/features/dashboard-widgets.js && node --check frontend/src/features/menu-customization.js && node --check frontend/src/features/sidebar-navigation.js && node --check frontend/src/features/navigation-search.js && node --check frontend/src/features/record-workflows.js && node --check frontend/src/runtime/stability-and-api.js && node --check playwright.config.js && node --check playwright.pages.config.js && node --check tests/unit/services.test.js && node --check tests/functional/smartbooks.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/pages-smoke.spec.js
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:functional
